2605.18253.title: Machine Unlearning for Masked Diffusion Language Models
2605.18253.paper_summary: Recent masked diffusion language models (MDLMs), such as LLaDA and Dream, have achieved performance comparable to autoregressive large language models. Unlike autoregressive models, which generate text sequentially, MDLMs generate text by iteratively denoising masked positions in parallel. During fine-tuning, MDLMs learn to recover responses from masked response states conditioned on a prompt, thereby shifting their predictions from a prompt-masked unconditional distribution toward a prompt-conditional distribution. Despite this distinct generative and fine-tuning mechanism, machine unlearning for MDLMs remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we propose Masked Diffusion Unlearning (MDU), the first unlearning framework for MDLMs, by revisiting the process of learning specific knowledge in terms of diffusion. Specifically, MDU minimizes a forward KL divergence from the prompt-conditional prediction to a prompt-masked unconditional anchor at every masked response position, with a temperature scaling parameter to control the privacy-utility trade-off. Our empirical results on standard benchmarks and MDLM backbones show that MDU achieves high unlearning performance compared to existing LLM unlearning methods. Code is available at https://github.com/leegeoru/MDU.
2605.18253.paper_summary_zh: 最近的遮罩擴散語言模型（MDLMs），如LLaDA和Dream，已達到與自回歸大型語言模型相當的性能。與自回歸模型逐步生成文本不同，MDLMs通過迭代去噪平行的遮罩位置來生成文本。在微調過程中，MDLMs學會根據提示從被遮罩的回應狀態中恢復回應，從而將其預測從提示遮罩的無條件分佈轉變為提示條件的分佈。儘管這種生成和微調機制截然不同，但對於MDLMs的機器去學習仍然基本上未被探索。在本文中，我們提出了遮罩擴散去學習（MDU），這是MDLMs的第一個去學習框架，通過重新考慮擴散過程中學習特定知識的過程。具體而言，MDU在每個被遮罩的回應位置最小化從提示條件預測到提示遮罩的無條件錨點的前向KL散度，並使用溫度縮放參數來控制隱私與效用的權衡。我們在標準基準和MDLM骨幹上的實證結果顯示，與現有的LLM去學習方法相比，MDU實現了高效的去學習性能。代碼可在https://github.com/leegeoru/MDU獲得。
2605.18253.author: Georu Lee et.al.
2605.18253.authors: Georu Lee, Seungwon Jeong, Hoki Kim, Jinseong Park, Woojin Lee
